text:
HHA must provide the medical supplies. The HHA may not require that 
the patient obtain or use medical supplies from any other source. Given the possibility of 
subsequent misunderstandings arising between the HHA and the patient on this issue, the 
HHA should document the beneficiary's decision to decline HHA furnished medical 
supplies and use their own resources. 

50.4.1.2 - Routine Supplies (Nonreportable) 
(Rev. 10438, Issued: 11-06-20, Effective: 03-01-20, Implementation: 01- 11-21)
